# EnVía - AI Agent Documentation

Welcome! You are interacting with EnVía, an open-source real-time railway board application for ADIF (Administrador de Infraestructuras Ferroviarias, Spain).

## Purpose
This web app provides real-time information on train departures and arrivals for major Spanish train stations using ADIF APIs.

## Capabilities
- Navigate between different train stations to view real-time traffic.
- Filter traffic by train types (AVE, Cercanías, Media Distancia, etc.).
- Switch between Departures (Salidas) and Arrivals (Llegadas).
- Switch themes (Light/Dark mode) through the configuration panel.

## Architecture
- Framework: Angular 17+ with Ionic Framework.
- Key Components:
  - `<app-board>`: Displays the real-time train schedule.
  - `<app-config-panel>`: Controls filters, station selection, and app theme.
  - `<ion-fab-button>`: Found on mobile to open the config panel.

## Tips for Agents
- The main data grid uses `aria-live="polite"` to dynamically announce updates.
- Buttons and interactive components are marked with proper ARIA attributes (e.g., `aria-label`).
- To change the station, interact with the `.station-box` (role=button).
- To switch departures/arrivals, interact with `.logo-box` (role=button).
